# Cyclops Salvage

Company: Cyclops Salvage
Website: https://cyclopssalvage.com
eBay Store: https://www.ebay.com/str/cyclopssalvage

## About
Cyclops Salvage is an online salvage and resale store selling hand-picked inventory across clothing, automotive parts, collectibles, memorabilia, and sporting goods. Everything listed is worth owning — no filler, no junk. All transactions handled through eBay with full buyer protection.

## What We Sell
- Dixon Flannels (vintage and collectible flannel shirts)
- BMW parts and automotive components
- Memorabilia and collectibles (signed items, sports, entertainment)
- Sporting goods
- Vintage clothing and apparel
- Art and decorative items

## How It Works
All buying, selling, and communication is handled through eBay. Browse the full store at https://www.ebay.com/str/cyclopssalvage. Questions go through eBay messaging. Returns and shipping policies are listed on each item.

## Pages
- Home: https://cyclopssalvage.com/
- eBay Store: https://www.ebay.com/str/cyclopssalvage
- eBay Profile: https://www.ebay.com/usr/cyclopssalvage
